ddls:
CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "activity_name" TEXT /* Name of the activity */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the community center where the activity is held */,
  "age_requirement" TEXT /* Age requirement for the activity */,
  "days_of_week" TEXT /* Days of the week the activity is offered */,
  "times" TEXT /* Times when the activity is held */,
  "address_location" TEXT /* Address or location of the activity */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the activity */,
  "max_participants" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed */,
  "min_participants" INTEGER /* Minimum number of participants required */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor leading the activity */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Level of difficulty */,
  "fees" TEXT /* Cost of the activity */,
  "is_recurring" INTEGER /* Indicates if the activity is recurring */,
  "recurring_pattern" TEXT /* Pattern of recurrence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES centers ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each community center */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the community center */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the community center */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the community center */,
  "operating_hours" TEXT /* Operating hours of the center */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the center's website */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the center manager */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the center */,
  "facilities" TEXT /* List of facilities available at the center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the participant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the participant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the participant */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the community center the participant is associated with */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the participant registered for the center */,
  "last_visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the participant's last visit to the center */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the participant is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES centers ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity the participant is registered for */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the registration (e.g., active, canceled) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of payment (e.g., paid, pending, refunded) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, check) */,
  "registration_type" TEXT /* Type of registration (e.g., individual, group) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the registration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_registrations_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the registration */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the activity */,
  "attended" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating whether the participant attended the activity */,
  "check_in_time" TEXT /* Time the participant checked in */,
  "check_out_time" TEXT /* Time the participant checked out */,
  "late" INTEGER /* Indicates if the participant was late */,
  "early" INTEGER /* Indicates if the participant left early */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_registration_id FOREIGN KEY ("registration_id") REFERENCES registrations ("registration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the community center where the resource is located */,
  "resource_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., court, equipment) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the resource available */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the resource */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  "is_available" INTEGER /* Indicates if the resource is currently available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES centers ("center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservations" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the activity the resource is reserved for */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being reserved */,
  "reservation_date" TEXT /* Date of the reservation */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the reservation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the reservation */,
  "reservation_status" TEXT /* Status of the reservation (e.g., confirmed, pending, canceled) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the reservation */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the reservation (e.g., practice, event) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES activities ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, staff, participant) */,
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the community center the user is associated with */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of user permissions */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("center_id") REFERENCES centers ("center_id")
)
